title: pimelea haematostachya
intro: Pimelea haematostachya, also known as Red Stilky Head or Crimson Stilky Head, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Pimelea haematostachya include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
